strategy: Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (+4% each); avoid Balance (40% resist).
These are low-health enemies, but killing one out of order makes the others interrupt-cast attacks every Round (Sandstorm, Big Bad Hound). Don't pick them off one at a time.
Build a quick blade and finish everything with one AoE so nothing survives to retaliate.
cheatNotes: Once Lacombe dies, Berkshire Sandstorms your team every Round. Kill them together, not one at a time.
Beguiling Berkshire or Lacombe also triggers the Sandstorm cheat.
Once Berkshire dies, Tamworth casts Big Bad Hound every Round. AoE everything at once.
